title: Chat Prefix
description: An auto-prefix mod to automatically truncate commands or more!
body:
# Chat Prefix
This mod is specially for those users who are looking for a way to run commands and a message as well, or something else other than commands ## How to Use Use the `/setprefix ` command to add a prefix! ![Set Prefix showcase](https://i.ibb.co/KjNWbsW9/Screenshot-2025-07-31-at-5-55-32-PM.png) And if you want to start truncating/adding prefixes, press the `K` key (Can be configured in Keybinds) to start using Chat Prefixes! ![command showcase](https://i.ibb.co/DHPGhHzn/Screenshot-2025-07-31-at-5-55-47-PM.png)
